description_long: This is an American football with a classic prolate spheroid shape, featuring a textured brown leather surface and prominent white laces for grip. The front side displays the Wilson brand logo in red, the NFL shield, and a visible valve for inflation. The opposite side is embossed with the word 'SAINTS' and features the New Orleans Saints' fleur-de-lis logo, along with the team name printed on either side of the logo. The surface is covered in small, raised pebbles for enhanced grip, and the seams are tightly stitched with visible thread. The football appears to be in good condition, with minimal signs of wear and no major scuffs or discoloration. This type of football is commonly used in professional and recreational settings, such as parks, sports fields, or urban play areas.
description: A brown, textured leather American football with white laces, Wilson and NFL branding, and New Orleans Saints logos. The surface is pebbled for grip and the ball appears well-maintained.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Wilson logo, NFL shield, white laces, and inflation valve.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature, visible laces, and partial Saints logo.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the embossed 'SAINTS' text, full Saints logo, and team name.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the seam stitching and partial laces.
